name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_Note
title: R5: Textual comment about the substance's catalogue or registry record (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.note` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.note` 0..* `Annotation`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.note` has a context of SubstanceSpecification based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
